celiac_simple.description: Simple 1:1 — gluten triggers GI symptoms within hours. 14 days, 3-7 foods/day.

cumulative_dairy.description: Cumulative threshold — dairy triggers after 3+ servings in a 2-day window. 30 days, 3-7 foods/day.

histamine_multi_trigger.description: Multiple trigger foods → same symptom cluster (histamine intolerance). 20 days, 3-7 foods/day.

delayed_nightshade.description: Delayed 24-48h reaction — nightshades → joint pain next morning. 15 days, sparse 3-5 foods/day.

no_correlation_control.description: Control — random symptoms, no dietary trigger (false-positive test). 10 days, 3-7 foods/day.
